summary: Completed testing for Admin Product Editor with photo upload functionality. All backend APIs (13/13 tests) passed. Frontend UI testing verified: Admin login, Products page, Advanced Editor with all tabs (Product Details, Foto's Uploaden, Media Beheer), Save functionality all working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Euro icon import fix in AdminAdvancedProductEditor.jsx is working correctly
Drag-and-drop photo upload zone with max 10 photos per product limit implemented
All 9 tabs in editor menu are accessible and functional
Image-info endpoint returns proper JSON for gallery management
Photo upload endpoints (POST /photos, DELETE /photos/{index}, PUT /photos/reorder) all functional
Supabase Storage integration configured for product-images bucket
seed_data_creation: None - used existing Schaapje product data in Supabase
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Product Editor is fully functional. Backend uses Supabase PostgreSQL. Photo uploads go to Supabase Storage bucket 'product-images'. All endpoints: GET /api/products, GET /api/products/{id}/advanced, GET /api/products/{id}/image-info, PUT /api/products/{id}, PUT /api/products/{id}/advanced, POST /api/products/{id}/photos, DELETE /api/products/{id}/photos/{index}, PUT /api/products/{id}/photos/reorder are working.

admin_login.details: Login with username='admin', password='Droomvriendjes2024!' works correctly

admin_products_page.details: GET /admin/products shows all 10 products with Edit and Advanced Editor buttons

advanced_editor_loads.details: GET /admin/products/{productId}/advanced-editor loads correctly with all 9 tabs

product_details_tab.details: Euro icon import fixed - Prijzen section shows correctly with € symbol

photos_upload_tab.details: Drag-drop zone, photo counter (9/10), existing gallery with numbered photos all visible

media_beheer_tab.details: Shows 3 main image slots (Hoofdafbeelding, Sfeer/Detail, Specificaties) and gallery overrides

product_advanced_endpoint.details: GET /api/products/{id}/advanced returns full product with gallery, features, customSections

photo_upload_endpoint.details: POST /api/products/{id}/photos validates file requirement (returns 422 when empty)

photo_delete_endpoint.details: DELETE /api/products/{id}/photos/{index} validates index (returns 400 for invalid index)

save_button.details: Save button on Product Details tab works - no errors after save

tests_executed: Frontend: Admin login page loads - PASS
Frontend: Login with correct credentials - PASS
Frontend: Admin products page shows all products - PASS
Frontend: Advanced Editor loads with all tabs - PASS
Frontend: Product Details tab shows Euro icon correctly - PASS
Frontend: Photos Upload tab shows drag-drop zone - PASS
Frontend: Photo counter shows X/10 - PASS
Frontend: Gallery photos numbered correctly - PASS
Frontend: Media Beheer tab loads - PASS
